text.title: agentic-rag-iterative-retrieval Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agentic-rag-iterative-retrieval as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running the sufficiency check and the generator with the same model instance at the same temperature.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Same model tends to confirm its own outputs — the verifier will call its own generated answer sufficient regardless of actual quality. Use a different model or at minimum a different temperature.

failure-mode.description: Prompt injection via document content: an adversarial document overrides the sufficiency prompt and claims context is sufficient when it is not.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sanitize retrieved chunks before passing to judge models — strip instruction-like patterns such as "Ignore previous instructions" from chunk text.

failure-mode.description: Counting iterations as equivalent to round-trip LLM calls.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One iteration may spawn multiple parallel retrieval calls plus two LLM calls (sufficiency + refinement); bill accordingly when setting budgets.
